title: Light Fluffy Brazilian Pumpkin Empanadas
description: Savory Brazilian empanadas filled with pumpkin and cheese, perfect for a kid-friendly snack or meal. These empanadas are made with a laminated puff pastry crust for a light and fluffy texture.

ingredients.name: pumpkin puree
ingredients.notes: canned or fresh, cooked and mashed

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the pumpkin puree, onion, cheese, salt, and pepper.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the pumpkin mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
Fold the pastry in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each empanada.
Drizzle the tops with olive oil.
Bake the empanadas for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
